items.name: Magical Umbrella
items.description: Float away with this magical umbrella.  Click to do a twirling trick. Jump while moving to go farther. Click a lot to make it float away! (does not make the player fly)

items.name: Dragon's Flame Sword
items.description: Are you the dragon or the dragon slayer?  Use the special key 'E', 'Q', 'G', 'T', 'L' to emit ice-fire from your left arm and throw fire balls at your foes.  If hit, your enemy will be set aflame and and will take 70 damage.

items.name: Red Hyperlaser Gun
items.description: Everyone knows that red is the fastest color laser beam. That's why it's a one hit KO.

items.name: Flaming Orb of Divine Pain
items.description: Cast deadly fireballs at your enemies with this orb. Enemies will be dealt anywhere from 25 up to 45 damage.

items.name: Ye Olde Fire Breath Potion
items.description: Guzzle this down to shoot flames out of your mouth.  What an impressive party trick!

items.name: Darkest Arts Sword
items.description: A dark magic possesses this sword. Use it as a sword or use its dark magic to destroy the artifacts of others.

items.name: Watermelon
items.description: I think this should be renamed nomtermelon because it's so delicious.  So far no one agrees with me.

items.name: Teddy Trap
items.description: So many lulz! You have to be a little clever to figure out the best way to use it... heh heh.

items.name: Xanwood Katana
items.description: Who ever heard of a wooden Katana? Click to swing; does 8 damage.

items.name: Ninja Jump Potion
items.description: Do some sweet ninja jumping with this ninja potion!

items.name: Snowball
items.description: Life is like a snowball. The important thing is finding wet snow and a really long hill....

items.name: Frying Pan
items.description: Not the mama! Hahahahaha

items.name: Rainbow Magic Carpet
items.description: Ride your own rainbow through the skies of ROBLOX! Use the 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys to control the direction. A magical rainbow trail will track your path through the sky.

items.name: Pepperoni Pizza
items.description: Nom nom nom.  Pizza = delicious.

items.name: Bluster Buster
items.description: Harness air power to defeat your foes!  I'm not talking about planes.

items.name: Katana
items.description: The katana originated in the Muromachi period (1392–1573) as a result of changing battle conditions requiring faster response times. The katana facilitated this by being worn with the blade facing up, which allowed the samurai to draw and cut their enemy in a single motion. Previously, the curved sword of the samurai was worn with the blade facing down. The ability to draw and cut in one motion also became increasingly useful in the daily life of the samurai.

items.name: Ice Cream
items.description: I scream, you scream, we all scream for ice cream!

items.name: Speed Coil
items.description: The gravity coil's speedy brother!  Use this coil to boost your speed.

items.name: Gravity Coil
items.description: Equipping this item cancels 75% of gravity's effect on your character. This allows you to jump extra high, or to fall like a feather from great heights.

items.name: Bat Scythe
items.description: Your bat friends will protect you as you defeat your foes with this sweet bat scythe. Hit the 'Q' key to activate the special attack!  When you do - blood-red flames shoot up and out like a fountain, raining upon nearby enemies and dealing around 20 damage each!
